dsl_rule.translation_notes: Used Donchian Channel (dc_upper/dc_lower) as proxy for N-day highs/lows. Large percent change threshold parameterized as 3% (0.03 decimal) — requires optimization via backtesting. Entry requires both N-day extreme AND large price move in close temporal proximity. Exit uses SMA crossover as reversal signal since optimal holding period was not specified (AUTHOR_SILENT). Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long and short entries depending on whether price reaches high or low.

backtest_rule.reason: Used Donchian Channel (dc_upper/dc_lower) as proxy for N-day highs/lows. Large percent change threshold parameterized as 3% (0.03 decimal) — requires optimization via backtesting. Entry requires both N-day extreme AND large price move in close temporal proximity. Exit uses SMA crossover as reversal signal since optimal holding period was not specified (AUTHOR_SILENT). source_rule_text: Enter a trade when a stock reaches an N-day high or low coinciding with a large percentage price change, signaling an imminent regime switch.
